channel.title: Us Politics on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Us Politics on MinWeb

item.title: What Is the 'Mamdani Act'? Inside the GOP’s New Bill
item.description: Explore the details of the controversial Mamdani Act, a new GOP bill targeting ideological figures and immigration policy, and understand its legal...

item.title: Trump and Joe Rogan’s New Executive Order on Psychedelics
item.description: Explore the details of the new Executive Order on psychedelic medicine, how it impacts federal funding and FDA review processes, and what it means for your...

item.title: Trump Fires AG Bondi: Todd Blanche Named New Attorney General
item.description: President Trump has fired Attorney General Pam Bondi, appointing Todd Blanche to lead the DOJ amid a broader administration shakeup and internal policy shifts.
